# 24h auto-loop queue. One YouTube URL per line. Comments (#) allowed.
#
# === HOW TO ADD URLS ===
# Paste any YouTube business / indie-hacker / SaaS interview here, one per line.
# The loop will pick the next un-processed one every 3 hours, generate a demo
# site from it, and add it to the public gallery.
#
# REQUIREMENTS for a URL to succeed:
#   - Video has captions (auto-generated or manual — both OK)
#   - Video is publicly accessible (not unlisted/private)
#   - At least one clear business / product mentioned
#
# === Known-working seed URLs (already in gallery, will be skipped) ===
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L9LfsOR1YHw
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oFtjKbXKqbg

# === Add YOUR favorite indie-hacker videos below ===
# Suggested channels with great transcripts:
#   * Lex Fridman podcast    - Pieter Levels, Marc Andreessen, etc.
#   * My First Million       - Sam Parr & Shaan Puri founder interviews
#   * Indie Hackers          - Courtland Allen weekly podcast
#   * Greg Isenberg          - solopreneur & community businesses
#   * Starter Story          - $1M+ founder breakdowns
#   * Ali Abdaal             - knowledge-business teardowns
#
# Paste a URL on each line. The loop reads this file every cycle, so adding
# new URLs while the loop is running takes effect on the next cycle.
